name: wrap-guide
author: lumine-code
description:
Displays a vertical line at the 80th character in the editor.
This packages uses the config value of `editor.preferredLineLength` when set.

columns.title: Columns
columns.description: Display guides at each of the listed character widths. Leave blank for one guide at your `editor.preferredLineLength`.

modifyPreferredLineLength.title: Modify Preferred Line Length
modifyPreferredLineLength.description: Modify the Editor's Preferred Line Length when changing Wrap Guide's Columns setting.

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: Show the wrap guide in editors.

showWrapGuide.title: Show Wrap Guide
showWrapGuide.description: Choose when to show the wrap guide.

enum.description: When soft wrap at preferred line length is enabled
